zh.lifeSummary: 當Johanna Swyke於1494年出生在英國萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特時，她的父親Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester48歲，母親Elizabeth Chaweband20歲。她於1508年與John Belgrave在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1515年在英國英格蘭素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年21歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Johanna Swyke于1494年出生在英国萊希斯特斯爾萊希斯特时，她的父亲Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester48岁，母亲Elizabeth Chaweband20岁。她于1508年与John Belgrave在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1515年在英国英格兰素福爾可格萊姆斯福德享年21岁。

nameMeanings.name: Swyke
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wick
meanings: English: from Middle English wik(e) (Old English wīc) ‘building; enclosed piece of land; dependent farm where a certain kind of work is done’. In placenames the term is frequently combined with words associated with food production, as in Butterwick ‘butter wick’, Chiswick ‘cheese wick’, Cowick ‘cow wick’, Hardwick ‘herd wick’, Gatwick ‘goat wick’, Shapwick ‘sheep wick’, Goswick ‘goose wick’, Berwick ‘barley wick’, Fishwick ‘fish wick’. The most common sense is ‘dairy farm’. The surname may be topographic or occupational, denoting someone who lived or worked at a wick (compare Wicker ), or habitational, denoting someone who lived at or came from a place called Wick (of which there are examples in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Wiltshire, and Worcestershire), Wyke (Devon, Dorset, Surrey, Yorkshire), or Week (Cornwall, Devon, Hampshire, Isle of Wight, Somerset).
German: from a medieval personal name Wicko, a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with the element wīg ‘battle, war’.
German: habitational name from Wick (Westphalia) or any of the places called Wieck or Wiek.

nameMeanings.name: Johanna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Jane
meanings: Originally a feminine form of John , from the Old French form Je(h)anne. Since the 17th century it has proved the most popular of the feminine forms of John, ahead of Joan and Jean . It now also commonly occurs as the second element in combinations such as Sarah-Jane. In Britain it is still one of the most frequent of all girls' names. It is not a royal name, but was borne by the tragic Lady Jane Grey ( 1537–54 ), who was unwillingly proclaimed queen in 1553 , deposed nine days later, and executed the following year. Seventy years earlier, the name had come into prominence as that of Jane Shore , mistress of King Edward IV and subsequently of Thomas Grey , 1st Marquess of Dorset, Lady Jane's grandfather. Jane Shore's tribulations in 1483 at the hands of Richard III , Edward's brother and successor, became the subject of popular ballads and plays, which may well have increased the currency of the name in the 16th century. A 19th-century influence was its use as the name of the central character in Charlotte Brontë's novel Jane Eyre ( 1847 ). From 1932 to 1959 it was used as the name of a cheerful and scantily clad beauty whose adventures were chronicled in a strip cartoon in the Daily Mirror. It is also borne by the American film stars Jane Russell ( 1921–2011 ) and Jane Fonda ( b. 1937 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Johanna Swyke was born in 1494, in Leicester, Leicestershire, England, her father, Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester, was 48 and her mother, Elizabeth Chaweband, was 20. She married John Belgrave in 1508, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. She died in 1515, in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 21.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Johanna Swyke est née en 1494, à Leicester, Leicestershire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Chaweband, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé John Belgrave en 1508, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1515, à Glemsford, Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 21 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Johanna Swyke 1494 in Leicester, Leicestershire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester 48 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Chaweband 20. Sie hat 1508 in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom John Belgrave geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1515 im Alter von 21 Jahren in Glemsford, Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Swyke è nata il nel 1494 nel Leicester, Leicestershire, England, sua padre, Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth Chaweband, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato John Belgrave nel 1508, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1515, nel Glemsford, Suffolk, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 21 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Johanna Swykeが1494年にイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアレアイセスターで生まれた時，父Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicesterは48歳，母Elizabeth Chawebandは20歳であった。1508年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードでJohn Belgraveと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1515年にイギリスイギリススフォルクグレムスフォードで21歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Johanna Swyke(이)가 1494년 영국 레이스스터실르 레이스스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Chaweband(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1508년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 John Belgrave(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1515년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크 글레스퍼드에서 21세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Johanna Swyke nasceu em 1494, em Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Chaweband, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com John Belgrave em 1508, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 1515, em Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 21 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Johanna Swyke родилась в 1494 г. в местности лисестир, лисестиршир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Chaweband, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Belgrave в 1508 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1515 г. в местности глемсфорд, суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 21 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Johanna Swyke nació en 1494, en Leicester, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Thomas Swyke Lord Mayor of Leicester, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Chaweband, tenía 20 años. Se casó con John Belgrave en 1508, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Murió en 1515, en Glemsford, Suffolk, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 21 años.
